name: Replay 集合管理与 UI 同步
description: 验证 Replay 分组创建、请求保存、移动同步、请求删除和分组删除的 UI 收敛

steps.message: ==== 步骤 1: 清理 Replay 数据 ====

steps.code: (async () => { const base = '/_bifrost/api/replay'; const requests = await fetch(`${base}/requests?limit=200`).then((r) => r.json()); for (const request of requests.requests || []) { await fetch(`${base}/requests/${encodeURIComponent(request.id)}`, { method: 'DELETE' }); } const groups = await fetch(`${base}/groups`).then((r) => r.json()); for (const group of groups.groups || []) { await fetch(`${base}/groups/${encodeURIComponent(group.id)}`, { method: 'DELETE' }); } await fetch(`${base}/history`, { method: 'DELETE' }); return true; })()

steps.message: ==== 步骤 2: 通过 UI 创建分组 ====

steps.code: (() => { const buttons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.ant-modal-root .ant-btn-primary')); const target = buttons.find((button) => button.offsetParent !== null); if (!target) return false; target.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

(async () => { const response = await fetch('/_bifrost/api/replay/groups').then((r) => r.json()); const group = (response.groups || []).find((item) => item.name === '${groupName}'); return group?.id || ''; })()

steps.message: ==== 步骤 3: 通过 UI 保存请求 ====

steps.code: (() => { const buttons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.ant-modal-root .ant-btn-primary')); const target = buttons.find((button) => button.offsetParent !== null); if (!target) return false; target.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

(async () => { const response = await fetch('/_bifrost/api/replay/requests?saved=true&limit=100').then((r) => r.json()); const request = (response.requests || []).find((item) => item.name === '${requestName}'); return request?.id || ''; })()

steps.message: ==== 步骤 4: 移动请求到分组并验证 UI 同步 ====

steps.code: (async () => { const response = await fetch('/_bifrost/api/replay/requests/${requestId}/move', { method: 'PUT', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ group_id: '${groupId}' }) }); return response.ok; })()

steps.message: 请求移动 API 执行成功
==== 步骤 5: 通过 UI 删除请求 ====

steps.code: (() => { const items = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.ant-dropdown .ant-dropdown-menu-title-content')); const target = items.find((item) => item.textContent.trim() === 'Delete'); if (!target) return false; target.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

steps.message: 请求已从 UI 列表移除
==== 步骤 6: 通过 UI 删除分组 ====

steps.code: (() => { const items = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.ant-dropdown .ant-dropdown-menu-title-content')); const target = items.find((item) => item.textContent.trim() === 'Delete'); if (!target) return false; target.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

steps.message: 分组已从 UI 列表移除
